---
title: "Evan Ho"
subtitle: "PhD Candidate in Evolutionary Genomics"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: selfie1.jpg
  image-shape: rectangle
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: evho@ucsc.edu
      href: mailto:evho@ucsc.edu
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/evanho550
---

## About Me

How does genomic variation shape disease onset and progression? I'm a PhD candidate 
at UC Santa Cruz in the Cornejo Lab using population genomics and computational 
biology to answer that question, from the pangenome of bacterial pathogens to the 
evolutionary dynamics of cancer.
